name: chr3_3q21_RAB7L1_region
description: 3q21 region encompassing RAB7L1 (RAB29) and the MEGF6/RHO paralog block. Flanking SDs contribute to rare 3q21 microdeletions; the locus is also a Parkinson's-disease susceptibility region (PARK16).

architecture.internal_structure: Flanking SDs of 15-40 kb at ~93% identity; RAB family paralog dispersion across multiple chromosomes.
